title: Flower and Song: Aztec Philosophical Poetry
source: Cantares Mexicanos; Romances de los Señores
description: Aztec poets ask the ultimate questions: is anything real? Do we truly live on earth? Only flower and song endure.
introduction: Aztec poets ask the ultimate questions: is anything real? Do we truly live on earth? Only flower and song endure.

translation.original_text: In tlaltipac. Zan achica ye nican. Tel ca chalchihuitl. No xamani. No teocuitlatl in tlapani.
translation.text: On earth. We are here only briefly. Even jade shatters. Even gold breaks apart.

translation.original_text: Ma zan in xochitl. Ma zan in cuicatl.
translation.text: Let there be only flowers. Let there be only song.
